description_long: This street food stall is a compact, two-story structure with a traditional Japanese architectural style, featuring a sloped wooden roof and a prominent overhanging awning. The front is adorned with a row of red lanterns and a large fabric banner with Japanese characters, suggesting a ramen shop. The upper level includes a wooden balcony and a cylindrical water tank, while the lower level has a serving counter sheltered by the awning. The exterior walls are finished in light plaster with wooden trim, and there are visible utility elements such as gas canisters and pipes on the side. The stall sits on a raised platform, with a mix of wood, metal, and plaster materials giving it a sturdy yet inviting appearance.
description: A traditional Japanese-style street food stall with a wooden roof, lanterns, and a fabric banner, featuring a serving counter and utility elements.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main serving counter, red lanterns, and a large fabric banner with Japanese text under the awning.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the upper balcony, cylindrical water tank, and utility canisters, with a side window and some boxes on the ground.
description_view_2: The back view displays a large wooden sliding door or window, minimal signage, and a small trash bin.
description_view_3: The side view highlights two upper windows, a hanging lantern, utility pipes, and a wall-mounted electrical box.
attribute_signage: A large white fabric banner with red Japanese characters hangs across the front under the awning, and a white cylindrical lantern with red text is suspended on the left side.
attribute_serving_counter: The serving counter spans the width of the stall under the awning, made of wood, with a simple flat surface and no visible glass shield or trays.
